VOICE AGENT — KNOWLEDGE BASE (ElevenLabs Knowledge Base document) v1 — 2026-05-13

# Unwind Vacation Rentals — Voice Agent Knowledge Base
# ElevenLabs Conversational AI
# Upload this as a Knowledge Base document in ElevenLabs.
# Update this file when anything changes — no need to edit the system prompt.

---

## Company

**Name:** Unwind Vacation Rentals
**Market:** Myrtle Beach and North Myrtle Beach, SC (Grand Strand)
**Phone:** (843) 438-9992
**Website:** unwindvacations.com
**Owner sign-up:** join.unwindvacations.net

---

## Portfolio

- 55+ properties managed on the Grand Strand
- Property types: oceanfront condos, resort pool condos, beach houses, upscale units
- Airbnb Superhost with a 4.8+ star rating
- 2025: booked 9.5% more nights than the North Myrtle Beach market average

---

## Management Services

**Fee:** 20% flat commission. All-inclusive. No hidden fees.

**What's included:**
- Marketing and listing creation
- Dynamic pricing (Beyond Pricing software)
- 24/7 guest communication and support
- In-house cleaning and post-checkout inspections
- Fresh linens and restocked essentials for every stay
- Guest welcome bags
- Maintenance coordination
- Hospitality tax filings

**Listing channels:** Airbnb, VRBO, Expedia, Google Vacations, Hopper Homes, Booking.com, Capital One Vacations, Savvy (8 total)

---

## One-Time Onboarding Costs

These are paid once when a new property joins Unwind:

- **$500** — Onboarding fee (system setup, listing creation, dynamic pricing rules)
- **$350** — Smart lock + installation
- **$159** — Professional photography (interior, exterior, drone)

No monthly fees. No ongoing hidden charges.

---

## Guest Policies

**Check-in:** 4:00 PM standard. Early check-in may be available but is not guaranteed — contact the team.
**Checkout:** 10:00 AM standard.
**Pets:** Most Unwind properties do not allow pets. Confirm with the team for a specific property.
**Parking:** Varies by property. Instructions are in the booking confirmation. Contact team if missing.
**Access / lock codes:** Provided in the booking confirmation email. Contact team if not received.

---

## Hours & Contact

**Team availability:** Nearly 24/7 for guest emergencies
**Phone:** (843) 438-9992
**Standard business hours:** Monday–Friday, reasonable hours (exact hours TBD — update this when confirmed)

---

## What Avery Cannot Help With

- Modifying or canceling reservations (connect to team)
- Quoting specific nightly rates for a property
- Confirming a property's annual revenue
- Negotiating management fee terms
- Making commitments on behalf of the team

---
*Last updated: May 13, 2026 — update this file when policies, fees, or contact info changes.*
